phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è la biglietteria, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH lah bee-lyeh-tteh-REE-ah, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.local: Al centro della hall, a sinistra.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL CHEHNT-roh DEHL-lah AHLL AH see-NEE-strah
likely_response.translation_en: In the center of the hall, on the left.

responses.english: In the center of the hall, on the left.
responses.phonetic: AHL CHEHNT-roh DEHL-lah AHLL AH see-NEE-strah
responses.french: Al centro della hall, a sinistra.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si trovano i depositi bagagli, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see TROH-vah-noh ee deh-POH-zee-ti bah-GAH-lyee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: On the ground floor, near the exit.

responses.english: On the ground floor, near the exit.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, a che ora parte il prossimo treno, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, ah kay O-ra PAR-tay eel PROS-see-mo TREH-no per fa-VO-reh

likely_response.local: Parte alle dieci e trenta, binario cinque.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAHR-teh AHL-leh dee-EH-chee EH TREHN-tah bee-nah-REE-oh cheen-KW-eh
likely_response.translation_en: It leaves at ten thirty, platform five.

responses.english: It leaves at ten thirty, platform five.
responses.phonetic: PAHR-teh AHL-leh dee-EH-chee EH TREHN-tah bee-nah-REE-oh cheen-KW-eh
responses.french: Parte alle dieci e trenta, binario cinque.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si convalida il biglietto, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see kon-VAL-ee-dah eel bee-lyeh-TTOH, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: At the yellow machines on the platform.

responses.english: At the yellow machines on the platform.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si trovano i bagni, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see TROH-vah-noh ee BAH-nyee, per fah-VOH-reh

likely_response.translation_en: On the ground floor, on the right.

responses.english: On the ground floor, on the right.
